my_thoughts: Five turns: shopping (T1) → demanding (T2) → materializing (T3) → defending (T4) → admitting confusion (T5) → synthesizing (T6). This is a complete teaching arc. T6's cognitive_breakthrough shows the previous five turns created the conditions. Each resistance, when met precisely, prepared the ground. My RM_04 response gives waking sleep instruction. But even this instruction must eventually be dropped. The practice eats itself.
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern... Deepening with comparison_contrast in response to intellectual_integration, purification_seeking. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Quite so.
Now, go within, into a state which you may compare to a state of waking sleep, in which you are aware of yourself, but not of the world.
In that state you will know, without the least trace of doubt, that at the root of your being you are free and happy.
The only trouble is that you are addicted to experience and you cherish your memories.
In reality it is the other way round; what is remembered is never real;
the real is now.
